overview: EduCampus is a Smart Notice Board web app with Admin and Student roles. Admins can post, edit, and delete notices with file attachments; students can browse, search, and view notices. A live dashboard shows notice analytics with pie and line charts. Features a sidebar layout, dark/light theme toggle, category tags, and smooth animations.
features: Create, edit, delete notices with categories and file links
Real-time notice search and category filtering
Pie chart (notices by category) + Line chart (notices over time)
Persistent sidebar navigation with dark/light theme toggle
Animated notice cards with category tags and detail view
